audience_shift.from: Slide generation feels like an opaque prompt-to-output jump.
audience_shift.to: Slide generation can be reviewed as evidence, story, visuals, rendering, and QA artifacts.

throughline: A reliable deck is not just generated; it is made inspectable before it is made beautiful.

beats.transition: Open with the promise of inspectable slide generation.
Give the audience the whole pipeline before naming any single gate.
Show why the evidence-first method is different from a one-shot deck prompt.
Ground the method in concrete repo paths and commands.
Explain why browser-testable HTML is the first practical output surface.
Close on targeted repair as the operating principle.
